description: Synapse — Unified Growth System for AI Agent Fleets

hooks.command: export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/werdoe/synapse/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/werdoe/plugin"; [ ! -d "$_R" ] && _R="$(dirname "$(find ~/.claude/plugins -name 'synapse-hooks.js' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1))"/..; node "$_R/scripts/init.js" >> /tmp/synapse-plugin.log 2>&1 || true; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/werdoe/synapse/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/werdoe/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/inject-guidance.js" 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo '{"continue":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/werdoe/synapse/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/werdoe/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/session-track.js" user-prompt 2>/dev/null || true; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/werdoe/synapse/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/werdoe/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/observe.js" 2>/dev/null || true; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/werdoe/synapse/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/werdoe/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/write-reflection.js" 2>/dev/null || true; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/werdoe/synapse/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/werdoe/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/synthesis-trigger.js" 2>/dev/null || true; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'
